title: Venganza Brutal
overview: Lulu, the daughter of wealthy couple Celso and Evelia, is unaware that her boyfriend is the leader of a violent gang involved in killings and robberies. Blinded by love, she has no idea of the dangerous world he truly belongs to.  In a twisted strategy driven by greed, her boyfriend orchestrates her own kidnapping, planning to demand a large ransom from her parents. When Celso and Evelia receive the first terrifying call from the abductors, their lives are thrown into chaos.  Desperate to save his daughter, Celso turns to an old friend known as Manchado for help. As they begin tracking those responsible, what starts as a rescue mission quickly transforms into a brutal quest for revenge — where betrayal, violence, and justice collide before it’s too late.
